subject: Warp/M <--> Relion
body:
WarpTools/2.0.0dev28 and Relion 5.0 beta3 commit 12cf15.

I imported tilt series alignments into Relion and Warp. I generate 
tomograms and they are perfectly aligned with one another.  However, I 
cannot successfully move particles between RELION and Warp/M.

1) Particles extracted in Relion refines well to 7A.  I import into M, run 
first round of refinement (iter 0) and it produces a blob at 50A.  

2) Same particles as above are instead extracted in Warp. Run a refinement 
in RELION and it gets stuck at 30A and overall is poor quality map.

any thoughts are welcome.

J
